evidence.source_title: Expulsion From Albania of the Mullahs' Ambassador and Intelligence Ministry Station Chief
evidence.description: Roudaki served as MOIS station chief in Vienna (until ~2014) and Albania (2017–2018). Expelled from Albania in December 2018 as persona non grata.

evidence.source_title: Iran's Balkan front: The roots and consequences of Iranian cyberattacks against Albania
evidence.description: MEI analysis identifies Roudaki as MOIS station chief expelled from Albania alongside Ambassador Mohammadnia.

editorial_notes: Upgraded from affiliated-with to served-in and from alleged to confirmed based on Albanian government's formal expulsion and multiple corroborating sources.
